title: Character Strings
description: Create character variables and combine them using paste().
problemStatement:
Combine text! Given `firstWord <- "Data"` and `secondWord <- "Science"`, join them with a space using the `paste()` function. Print the result.

**Requirement:** Use `firstWord` and `secondWord` as arguments.
hints: `paste()` adds a space by default; use `paste0()` for no space.
